productDisplayName: ADIDAS Women Desma Low White Pink Shoe
description: Get ready to run in style with these Desma shoes from adidas. These comfortable shoes are high on performance attributes and come in pastel shades that looks great when teamed up with jeans and tees for a cool casual look.UpperMesh upper for enhanced breathability and dry comfortSynthetic leather overlays for added structure, especially to the midfootIconic three stripes strategically placed on the sides to give more structureCushioned collar and tongue for plush comfortMesh tongue for breathabilityLace-ups for snug FitHeel cup for better fit and supportHeat transfer logo on heel counter and tongueMidsoleCushioned footbed for support and all day comfortPhylon midsole for lightweight strengthOutsoleScooped out air sole unit in the heel for cushioningImpact guidance pattern on the outsole for smoother motion of the feetFlex grooves for natural movement of the feetTPR outsole with lugs for better traction and durabilityWash careRub surface with a clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
